title: yulania × pilocarpa
intro: Yulania × pilocarpa, also known as Yulania × pilocarpa or Sargent's magnolia, is a hybrid plant species that results from the cross between Yulania and Pilocarpa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Yulania × pilocarpa include reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic, and possessing anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Yulania × pilocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, or used in other herbal preparations, such as capsules or tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
